entry: I am/I'm ... (fine, sick, hungry, tired, thirsty, sad, happy …).
I'm a  boy/I'm a girl/He's a boy/She's a girl

meaning: the one that follows the present one
to form a negative phrase after be/can, etc.

entry: there is / there are / there was, etc

meaning: used when referring to a group of people, animals or things
to refer to something or someone that can be seen

entry: Today is … (weather: rainy, hot, cold, nice)
What  (fruit / vegetable / sport) do you like?
don't need to do sth / needn't do sth
translate: לא צריך לעשות sth / לא צריך לעשות sth

meaning: with two parts, twice as much

entry: give in sth or give sth in
translate: לתת sth או לתת sth in

entry: give out sth or give sth out
have fun / a nice time / a problem, etc.

meaning: used when you are going to say something which is surprising

entry: I/you/he, etc. had better do sth
translate: מוטב לי/אתה/הוא וכו' לעשות דבר כזה

meaning: to give next word or group of words negative meaning
say you will do, saying you will do
travel (e.g., on foot); broadcasts (e.g., on TV)
character in a movie or play
give money for work, goods, etc.

entry: pick up sb/sth or pick sb/sth up
translate: להרים sb/sth או לקחת sb/sth up

meaning: decide what you are going to do

entry: put away sth or put sth away
translate: לשים משם sth או לשים sth

entry: put down sb/sth or put sb/sth down
put out sth or put sth out

meaning: take a train, plane etc; take time; take medicine, drugs etc)

entry: take away sth or take sth away
translate: לקחת משם sth או לקחת sth משם

entry: take off sth or take sth off
translate: להמריא sth או להוריד sth off

meaning: a piece of work that needs to be done, especially one that is a regular part of one's role
one side to another; start to end

entry: turn off sth or turn sth off / turn on sth or turn sth on
translate: כבה או כבה / הפעל דבר או הפעל

meaning: to refer to something without naming it
used to ask or talk about a choice
modal for able/willing; for expressing future; for expressing intention; for making a request

entry: write sth down or write down sth

meaning: something which has been written or printed
